basics.description:
**Note:** Please refer to the following before installing the solution: • Review the solution [Release Notes](https://github.com/Azure/Azure-Sentinel/tree/master/Solutions/Check%20Point%20Cyberint%20Alerts/ReleaseNotes.md) • There may be [known issues](https://aka.ms/sentinelsolutionsknownissues) pertaining to this Solution, please refer to them before installing. Check Point provides Microsoft Sentinel integration to streamline critical Alerts and bring enriched threat intelligence from the Infinity External Risk Management solution into Microsoft Sentinel. This simplifies the process of tracking the status of tickets with automatic sync updates across systems. Using this new integration for Microsoft Sentinel, existing Check Point Exposure Management and Microsoft Sentinel customers can easily pull logs based on Check Point Exposure Management findings into Microsoft Sentinel platform.

NOTE: Microsoft recommends installation of Check Point Exposure Management Alerts Connector (via Codeless Connector Platform). This connector is build on the Codeless Connector Platform (CCP), which uses the Log Ingestion API, which replaces ingestion via the deprecated HTTP Data Collector API. CCP-based data connectors also support Data Collection Rules (DCRs) offering transformations and enrichment.

**Data Connectors:** 1, **Workbooks:** 1, **Analytic Rules:** 1, **Playbooks:** 9 [Learn more about Microsoft Sentinel](https://aka.ms/azuresentinel) | [Learn more about Solutions](https://aka.ms/azuresentinelsolutionsdoc)

options.text: This Solution installs the data connector for Check Point Exposure Management Alerts. You can get Check Point Exposure Management Alerts data in your Microsoft Sentinel workspace. After installing the solution, configure and enable this data connector by following guidance in Manage solution view.

link.label: Learn more about connecting data sources

options.text: This solution installs a workbook to help you gain insights into the Check Point Exposure Management alerts ingested into Microsoft Sentinel.

elements.name: workbook1
elements.label: Check Point Exposure Management - Alert Overview & Sync Health

elements.name: workbook1-name
elements.label: Display Name
elements.defaultValue: Check Point Exposure Management - Alert Overview & Sync Health

options.text: This solution installs the following analytic rule template. After installing the solution, create and enable this rule in the Manage solution view.

This solution installs the Playbook templates to help implement your Security Orchestration, Automation and Response (SOAR) operations. After installing the solution, these will be deployed under Playbook Templates in the Automation blade in Microsoft Sentinel. They can be configured and managed from the Manage solution view in Content Hub.
